Widely known as the '''Republic recon speeder''', the '''Gaba-18''' was an [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] used by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] for frontline operations on contested and enemy worlds.

==Characteristics==
The recon speeder was modified for military use. It was painted in the red-and-white hues adopted by the Grand Army of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and featured a cockpit protected by a bubble canopy that could seat a single pilot. The speeder was lightly shielded, and featured a blaster cannon mounted on the forward hull.<ref name="SWTCG" />

==History==
Republic recon speeders were deployed to support frontline operations, often scouting ahead in advance of larger Republic vehicles.
The speeder could fly over a variety of terrain, including rocky environments such as the landscape of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].<ref name="SWTCG" />

[[File:Gaba-18-CoCo.jpg|thumb|180px|Gaba-18 in [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo Town]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].|left]]
